sources.title: glide-mq GitHub Repository
keyInsights: 1-RTT per job via FCALL server functions
Rust NAPI core via valkey-glide for lower latency
Cluster-native with hash-tagged keys
35-38% faster than BullMQ at concurrency >= 10
addBulk: 10,000 jobs in 350ms
API mirrors BullMQ for easy migration

sources.title: Valkey Streams Introduction
keyInsights: Streams provide persistent log-based message queuing
Consumer groups enable exactly-once delivery within a group
PEL (Pending Entries List) tracks unacknowledged messages
XACK completes message processing

sources.title: Valkey Server Functions Introduction
keyInsights: Server Functions persist across restarts (unlike EVAL)
FCALL invokes loaded functions with key arguments
No per-call compilation overhead
Functions can access multiple keys atomically

sources.title: Valkey GLIDE Node.js Documentation
keyInsights: Official Valkey client with Rust core and NAPI bindings
Supports standalone and cluster modes
Built-in connection pooling and failover

sources.title: @valkey/valkey-glide npm package
keyInsights: Node.js 16+ required
Platform-specific native binaries distributed via optional deps
Part of the official valkey-io organization

sources.title: Valkey GLIDE Pub/Sub Basics
keyInsights: Three subscription modes: Exact, Pattern, Sharded
Automatic reconnection for all subscriptions
Pub/Sub is fire-and-forget; Streams provide persistence

sources.title: Valkey FCALL Command Reference
keyInsights: FCALL signature: FCALL function numkeys key [key ...] arg [arg ...]
All accessed keys must be explicitly provided
Functions loaded via FUNCTION LOAD persist across restarts

sources.title: BullMQ Documentation
keyInsights: BullMQ is the incumbent Node.js queue library
Uses ioredis and Lua EVAL scripts
API structure that glide-mq mirrors for migration compatibility

sources.title: AWS Blog: Introducing Valkey GLIDE
keyInsights: GLIDE is multi-language with shared Rust core
Designed for reliability and high availability
Optimized for ElastiCache and MemoryDB

sources.title: DeepWiki: Valkey GLIDE Pub/Sub and Streaming
keyInsights: GLIDE provides unified interface for standalone and cluster pub/sub
Sharded channels available in cluster mode only
Streams vs Pub/Sub trade-offs clearly explained

sources.title: Valkey GLIDE GitHub Repository
keyInsights: Multi-language: Java, Python, Node.js, Go
Core written in Rust with language bindings
Protobuf protocol between language layer and Rust core

sources.title: Valkey XREADGROUP Command
keyInsights: Consumer groups provide load balancing across consumers
Each message delivered to exactly one consumer in a group
PEL tracks delivery until XACK acknowledgment
